entity.label: Oren
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Ash or pine, the son of Jerahmeel (1 Chr. 2:25).

nodes.label: Oren
nodes.description: Ash or pine, the son of Jerahmeel (1 Chr. 2:25).

nodes.label: Jerahmeel
nodes.description: The son of Hezron, the brother of Caleb (1 Chr. 2:9, 25, 26, etc.).

nodes.label: Ahijah
nodes.description: One of the five sons of Jerahmeel, who was great-grandson of Judah (1 Chr. 2:25).

nodes.label: Ram
nodes.description: One of the sons of Jerahmeel (1 Chr. 2:25, 27).

verses.text: And the sons of Jerahmeel the firstborn of Hezron were, Ram the firstborn, and Bunah, and Oren, and Ozem, and Ahijah.
